LeidenUniv.Omero

Class getOmeroDatasetAndAttachData

  • java.lang.Object
    • LeidenUniv.Omero.getOmeroDatasetAndAttachData
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ij.gui.DialogListener, ij.plugin.PlugIn
    Deprecated.

    @Deprecated
public class getOmeroDatasetAndAttachData
extends java.lang.Object
implements ij.gui.DialogListener, ij.plugin.PlugIn
    This plugin is to get a connection to OMERO, obtain an image collection and to attach data back to OMERO

      • openImagePlus

        public ij.ImagePlus openImagePlus(java.lang.Long imageId,
                                  java.lang.Long gid)
                           throws java.lang.Exception
        Deprecated. 
        Open an image using the Bio-Formats LOCI imageplusreader.
        Parameters:
        imageId - The id of the image to open
        gid - The group id to which the image belongs
        Returns:
        returns the opened ImagePlus
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception - of the OMEROException class

      • attachFile

        public void attachFile(java.io.File file,
                       java.lang.String description,
                       java.lang.String NAME_SPACE_TO_SET,
                       java.lang.String datatype,
                       omero.gateway.model.ImageData image)
        Deprecated. 
        Parameters:
        file - the file to attach
        description - a description of the file
        NAME_SPACE_TO_SET - the name space of the filtype you want to attach
        datatype - the type of data to set the Mimetype
        image - the image to attach it to
